title: Smallest String Starting From Leaf
hints: Start a depth-first search from the root, accumulating the path of characters as you descend toward the leaves.
When you reach a leaf, reverse the accumulated characters to form the string from leaf to root, then compare it with the current best.
Track the lexicographically smallest string found across all leaf-to-root paths; since shorter prefixes are smaller, prioritize shorter valid paths when comparing.
